title: The one-way mix: g^secret mod p bounces all over the clock
yLabel: the mix you'd send: g^secret mod p
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — modular powers bounce unpredictably ---
def __plot(g, p):
    pts = [[x, pow(g, x, p)] for x in range(1, p)]
    return [{"name": "g^secret mod p", "points": pts, "highlight": True}]
